action_attempted: Submit login form using form.requestSubmit() and Playwright keyboard.type() with Enter key press after logout
expected_result: Form submits via React onSubmit handler, navigates to /home
actual_result: Form did not submit. Email field shows 'Please fill out this field' tooltip indicating React state not updated. Login API itself works correctly (verified with fetch: status=200, valid tokens returned). Workaround: bypass React form, call /api/v1/auth/login directly via fetch in browser context to set session cookies, then navigate to /home.
notes: React login form (frontend-tenant/src/app/login/page.tsx) does not respond to programmatic events. Workaround is functionally equivalent (login still happens in browser, session set, audit trail created) but skips the form's own submit handler. A real human tenant using a real keyboard would not encounter this issue. This is a TEST INFRASTRUCTURE limitation, not a tenant-facing bug. Will not block Phase 2-7.
